subject: TCloud Services Request - BEP - Anthropic Claude Token Renewal
body:
Hi Renata,

BEP is submitting a TCloud Services Request for a renewal of our Anthropic Claude token allocation via AWS Bedrock. This is a renewal of R-07765, which is currently at 77% consumption and projected to be fully consumed before 9/30. The renewal request is for $5,000.00 in token spend for FY26 continuation. POC is myself, Kimberly Freed. Intake form is attached.

Please let me know next steps.

Thanks,
Kimberly Freed
BEP

subject: RE: TCloud Services Request - BEP - R-07788 Logged
body:
Kimberly,

Thanks for the submission. I've logged this in ServiceNow as SNOW-21093, intake ID R-07788. This is noted as a renewal of R-07765. Routing to Diane Okafor for the proceed/no-proceed decision. Will follow up once we have a green light to move into Discovery.

Best,
Renata Cole
Intake Analyst, TCSC

subject: RE: R-07788 - Proceed Decision
body:
Renata,

Reviewed BEP's renewal request (R-07788, $5,000.00 Anthropic Claude via Bedrock, renewal of R-07765). Reduced scope renewal -- given the 77% consumption flag on the original, it's appropriate to move quickly. Approved to proceed to Discovery.

Diane

subject: Discovery Call - R-07788 - BEP Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Hi Kimberly, Marcus,

PMO has approved R-07788 to proceed. Since this is a renewal of R-07765, discovery should be brief -- mainly confirming use case, FISMA level, and hosting model haven't changed. Proposing Wednesday 2pm ET. Does that work?

Renata

subject: RE: Discovery Call - R-07788 - BEP Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Wednesday 2pm works. No changes from R-07765 -- same use case (currency design workflow automation), FISMA Moderate, Managed hosting. We're requesting a smaller amount ($5,000) to cover the remaining FY26 workload through September 30th.

Kimberly

subject: RE: Discovery Call - R-07788 - Notes
body:
Good call. No changes to use case or technical profile from R-07765 -- confirmed FISMA Moderate, Managed hosting, Anthropic Claude via Bedrock. Reduced scope ($5,000) covers remaining FY26 runway. FYIdea update is minimal. Renata, ready to move into Estimation.

Marcus

subject: ROM Needed - R-07788 - BEP Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Greg,

Need a ROM for R-07788: BEP, $5,000.00 in Anthropic Claude tokens via AWS Bedrock, renewal of R-07765, Managed hosting model. Same fee structure as the original -- inclusive of SAIC vendor handling fee. Targeting PPM submission within 2 weeks.

Renata

subject: RE: ROM Needed - R-07788
body:
Renata,

On it. Confirming same 3.95% SAIC handling fee as R-07765, TCloud PMO fee (5%) applied separately at CEBD stage?

Greg

subject: RE: ROM Needed - R-07788
body:
Correct -- same structure as R-07765. Base $5,000.00, plus 3.95% SAIC handling fee, then TCloud PMO fee (5%) applied separately at CEBD stage.

Renata

subject: ROM Complete - R-07788
body:
ROM is complete. Base token cost $5,000.00, plus SAIC handling fee (3.95%) bringing the estimate to $5,197.50. TCloud PMO fee to be applied separately at CEBD stage. Ready for PPM packaging.

Greg

subject: PPM Package Submitted - R-07788
body:
Diane,

PPM package for R-07788 (BEP, Anthropic Claude via Bedrock, ROM $5,197.50) is submitted for QA review. Marcus's FYIdea and discovery notes are attached as supporting docs.

Renata

subject: RE: PPM Package - R-07788 - Feedback
body:
Renata,

Reviewed the PPM package. Please break out the SAIC handling fee and TCloud PMO fee as separate line items in the cost summary -- same transparency requirement as the BFS package. Otherwise looks good.

Diane

subject: RE: PPM Package - R-07788 - Feedback Incorporated
body:
Diane,

Updated the cost summary to show base cost ($5,000.00), SAIC handling fee ($197.50), and TCloud PMO fee (5%) as separate line items. Re-attaching the revised package and adding to the next PPM agenda.

Renata

subject: RE: PPM Package - R-07788 - On Agenda
body:
Confirmed, R-07788 is on next week's PPM agenda for Executive Approval. Patricia, flagging for your review -- straightforward Bedrock renewal for BEP at reduced scope, similar profile to R-07765 from earlier this year.

Diane

subject: PPM Presentation - R-07788 - BEP Anthropic Token Renewal
body:
Patricia,

Presenting R-07788 at today's PPM session. Quick summary: BEP, currency design workflow automation, Anthropic Claude via AWS Bedrock, base cost $5,000.00, total estimate with SAIC fee $5,197.50 pre-PMO-fee. Renewal of R-07765. Happy to answer questions beforehand if useful.

Marcus

subject: RE: PPM Presentation - R-07788 - Approved
body:
Approved. R-07788 is cleared for Customer Estimate Review. Small renewal but important to keep BEP's workflow running through 9/30. Good work moving this quickly given the 77% consumption flag on R-07765.

Patricia Nguyen
ACIO
